case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. PABLITO GAMIT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210005712) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET (TRANSACTION ID # 200039220) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 200039220) TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200042333), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED OCT-26-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-27-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO

DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 210005712) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 200039220) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $239.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210005712) AS TO DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO $3,601.72 PRINCIPAL, $239.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,841.22, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200039220) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO DOES 1 TO 25 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2022
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210005712) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 200039220) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
